item.name: Reasonscale Silverside
item.description:
After being introduced to the Stardust Sea, this striking silver fish soon began to thrive.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 1 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: When Tuliyollal's population began to boom, the Head of Reason sought to preempt future shortages by introducing this foreign species as a source of food. Fortunately for the growing city and its hungry residents, the fish soon became established in their new environment.
